title: [Phase 0] Add Codex AGENTS.md, skills, and GitHub operating system
body:
Tasks:
- [ ] Read AGENTS.md and relevant skill.
- [ ] Implement the requested phase scope.
- [ ] Update docs/PLAN_CHECKLIST.md.
- [ ] Run relevant checks.

Acceptance:
- [ ] Acceptance criteria in docs/PLAN_CHECKLIST.md pass.
- [ ] Optional runtimes fall back to SVG.
- [ ] No external network calls.
